languages.text: "Ваш способ привлечь внимание крайне эффектен, Вольный Торговец". {n}Эоганн рассматривает окровавленный орган, поднесенный мехадендритом к самому лицу.{/n} "Этот опрометчивый поступок чуть не стоил мне селезенки. Впрочем, давно пора рассмотреть ее замену на бионический аналог. Нунциус, залогируй эту мысль". {n}Гибкая железная манипула, повинуясь командам генетора, вновь помещает комок кровавой плоти куда-то внутрь его зияющего чрева.{/n}

"Your method of attracting attention is highly effective, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn examines the bloody organ, which is being held up to his face by a mechadendrite.{/n} "That rash act almost cost me my spleen. Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

languages.text: "Eure Methode, Aufmerksamkeit zu erregen, ist ausgesprochen effektiv, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Eogunn untersucht das blutige Organ, das ein Mechadendrit vor sein Gesicht hält.{/n} "Diese überstürzte Aktion hätte mich beinahe die Milz gekostet. Andererseits hätte ich sie wohl schon längst durch ein bionisches Äquivalent ersetzen sollen. Nuncius, protokolliert diesen Gedanken." {n}Der flexible Metallmanipulator, der den Befehlen des Genetors gehorcht, setzt den blutigen Fleischklumpen wieder in seinen klaffenden Bauch ein.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your method of attracting attention is highly effective, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn examines the bloody organ, which is being held up to his face by a mechadendrite.{/n} "That rash act almost cost me my spleen. Andererseits hätte ich sie wohl schon längst durch ein bionisches Äquivalent ersetzen sollen. Nuncius, protokolliert diesen Gedanken." {n}Der flexible Metallmanipulator, der den Befehlen des Genetors gehorcht, setzt den blutigen Fleischklumpen wieder in seinen klaffenden Bauch ein.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez une façon très efficace d'attirer l'attention, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}Eogunn examine l'organe sanguinolent qu'une mécadendrite tient devant son visage.{/n} « Cette action inconsidérée a failli me coûter ma rate. Cela dit, j'aurais dû songer à la remplacer par un équivalent bionique depuis longtemps. Nuncius, prends-en note. » {n}Le manipulateur de métal flexible, sur ordre du genetor, replace le morceau de chair ensanglanté dans son abdomen béant.{/n}

Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

Nuncius, prends-en note. » {n}Le manipulateur de métal flexible, sur ordre du genetor, replace le morceau de chair ensanglanté dans son abdomen béant.{/n}

languages.text: “您吸引注意力的方式确实高效，行商浪人。”{n}伊奥贡端详着被机械触须举到面前的血淋淋的器官。{/n}“那鲁莽之举差点让我失去脾脏。不过话说回来，我早该考虑将其替换为仿生构件了。努恩修斯，把这条想法记录下来。”{n}灵活的金属触须听从基因士的指令，将那团血肉重新塞回他敞开的腹腔之中。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your method of attracting attention is highly effective, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn examines the bloody organ, which is being held up to his face by a mechadendrite.{/n} "That rash act almost cost me my spleen. Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您吸引注意力的方式确实高效，行商浪人。”{n}伊奥贡端详着被机械触须举到面前的血淋淋的器官。{/n}“那鲁莽之举差点让我失去脾脏。不过话说回来，我早该考虑将其替换为仿生构件了。努恩修斯，把这条想法记录下来。”{n}灵活的金属触须听从基因士的指令，将那团血肉重新塞回他敞开的腹腔之中。{/n}

languages.text: «Su método de llamar la atención es muy eficaz, Comerciante Independiente». {n}Eogunn examina el órgano ensangrentado que una mecadendrita sujeta cerca de su cara.{/n} «Su acción casi me cuesta el bazo, aunque supongo que debería haberme planteado una sustitución biónica hace mucho. Nuncius, registre la idea». {n}El flexible manipulador de metal, obedeciendo al genetor, reinserta la carne ensangrentada en su vientre abierto.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your method of attracting attention is highly effective, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn examines the bloody organ, which is being held up to his face by a mechadendrite.{/n} "That rash act almost cost me my spleen. Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Su método de llamar la atención es muy eficaz, Comerciante Independiente». {n}Eogunn examina el órgano ensangrentado que una mecadendrita sujeta cerca de su cara.{/n} «Su acción casi me cuesta el bazo, aunque supongo que debería haberme planteado una sustitución biónica hace mucho. Nuncius, registre la idea». {n}El flexible manipulador de metal, obedeciendo al genetor, reinserta la carne ensangrentada en su vientre abierto.{/n}

languages.text: 「注意を引くための君のやり方は実に効果的だな、ローグ・トレーダー。」{n}エオガンは、メカデンドライトによって顔の前に掲げられた血まみれの臓器を検分する。{/n}「あの無謀な行いで、危うく脾臓を失うところだった。もっとも、とうの昔にこれをバイオニックの同等品へ置き換えることを検討すべきだったのだ。ヌンキウス、その考えを記録しておけ。」{n}ジェネターの命令に従い、しなやかな金属のマニピュレーターが、血まみれの肉塊を彼の開いた腹のどこかへと戻し入れる。{/n}

Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「注意を引くための君のやり方は実に効果的だな、ローグ・トレーダー。」{n}エオガンは、メカデンドライトによって顔の前に掲げられた血まみれの臓器を検分する。{/n}「あの無謀な行いで、危うく脾臓を失うところだった。もっとも、とうの昔にこれをバイオニックの同等品へ置き換えることを検討すべきだったのだ。ヌンキウス、その考えを記録しておけ。」{n}ジェネターの命令に従い、しなやかな金属のマニピュレーターが、血まみれの肉塊を彼の開いた腹のどこかへと戻し入れる。{/n}

languages.text: "Dikkat çekme yönteminiz son derece etkili Hür Tacir." {n}Eogunn, bir mekadentritin yüzüne tuttuğu kanlı organı inceliyor.{/n} "Bu fevri hareket, neredeyse dalağıma mal oluyordu. Yine de onu çok uzun zaman önce biyonik bir dengiyle değiştirmeyi düşünmeliydim. Nuncius, bu düşünceyi kaydet." {n}Genetör'ün komutlarına uyan esnek metal manipülatör, kanlı et parçasını açık karnının içine geri yerleştiriyor.{/n}
